name: Transformation Punishment 2: PUNISH HARDER!
description:
Well, it finally happened.

You've committed a serious crime! After you jaywalked in an abandoned neighborhood, you were arrested and now are facing trial! Unfortunately for you, it's been a whole year since the Transformation Punishment machine was legalized and used, and since it's legalization, it has faced many upgrades.

Can you prove your innocence before you are transformed?

Shoutout to my homie @DexDlli0n45. he helped me with this bot a lot.

Original bot if you want to check it out: https://janitorai.com/characters/f1ef65b1-3412-46c6-9ea3-b2109940c79f_character-transformation-punishment

artist link: https://www.deviantart.com/saturnxart

i had some new ideas so we are back in the ring. this features all the original transformations from the first bot, so dont worry about that, and dont worry about the old bot going down. this will act more as an alternative rather than a replacement. ive got a few more ideas in me for some saturnxart bots, so stay tuned.
creator: Flipnotefort
